completed_tasks.name: Update src/cli.ts – Setup Wizard for Linux (P1.5)

human_actions_pending.context: Phase 1 implementation complete but untested on actual Linux environment. Verification checklist exists in 01-VERIFICATION.md.
Ensure Windows functionality preserved after platform abstraction changes.

decisions.decision: Keep config dir as ~/.claude/claude-remote for v1 (no XDG migration yet)
decisions.rationale: Maintain backward compatibility and align with Claude's own config location. XDG compliance deferred to Phase 2 or later.
Simplest approach; cleanup on exit prevents accumulation. macOS uses /private/tmp.

decisions.decision: Centralize platform detection in platform.ts using process.platform
decisions.rationale: Single source of truth; all modules import helpers. Avoids scattered conditionals.

decisions.decision: Add binary verification with which and helpful install messages
decisions.rationale: Early failure with clear guidance improves user experience on fresh installs.

next_action: Proceed to Phase 2 planning OR run manual verification tests for Phase 1
context_notes: Phase 1 (Platform Abstraction) execution completed successfully. All 7 tasks done, 6 commits made. Code is expected to compile; manual Linux testing required to validate IPC, PTY, and Discord connectivity. Windows code paths preserved. Phase 1 plan marked complete in ROADMAP.md and STATE.md. Next: either verify Phase 1 manually or move to Phase 2 planning (Linux Shell Integration Polish).
